---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest a safe CodexLink improvement
title: "[Feature]: "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ""
---

## Problem

What user problem should this solve?

## Proposed Solution

Describe the feature.

## Safety Considerations

Does this touch local files, relay, GPT Actions, MCP, tokens, or workspace data?

## Non-Goals

What should this feature avoid doing?

## Acceptance Criteria

- [ ] Local-first behavior is preserved.
- [ ] No secrets or runtime files are exposed.
- [ ] Tests or smoke coverage are included when relevant.
